github.com/cloudflare/circl/blindsign.overview: Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Information Exposure. When sampling randomness for a shared secret, the implementation of Kyber and FrodoKEM, did not check whether crypto/rand.Read() returns an error. In rare deployment cases (error thrown by theRead() function), this could lead to a predictable shared secret.

github.com/cloudflare/circl/abe/cpabe/tk.overview: Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Information Exposure. When sampling randomness for a shared secret, the implementation of Kyber and FrodoKEM, did not check whether crypto/rand.Read() returns an error. In rare deployment cases (error thrown by theRead() function), this could lead to a predictable shared secret.

github.com/imgproxy/imgproxy/v3.remediation: Upgrade github.com/imgproxy/imgproxy/v3 to version 3.15.0 or higher.
github.com/imgproxy/imgproxy/v3.overview:
github.com/imgproxy/imgproxy/v3 is a fast and secure standalone server for resizing and converting remote images.
Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Server-side Request Forgery (SSRF) due to a lack of sanitization of the imageURL parameter.
Exploiting this vulnerability may lead to an internal enumeration of internal hosts or ports.

github.com/effectindex/tripreporter.remediation: A fix was pushed into the master branch but not yet published.
github.com/effectindex/tripreporter.overview: Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Improper Authentication such that any user with an account on an instance of effectindex/tripreporter, e.g. subjective.report, may be affected by an improper password verification vulnerability. The vulnerability allows any user with a password matching the password requirements to log in as any user.

github.com/answerdev/answer/internal/mig.overview: Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Missing Authorization such that a user can perform actions on another user's behalf.

github.com/mutagen-io/mutagen/cmd.remediation: Upgrade github.com/mutagen-io/mutagen/cmd to version 0.16.6, 0.17.1 or higher.
github.com/mutagen-io/mutagen/cmd.overview: Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Improper Neutralization such that Mutagen command line operations, as well as the log output from mutagen daemon run, are susceptible to control characters that could be provided by remote endpoints. This can cause terminal corruption, either intentional or unintentional, if these characters are present in error messages, file paths/names, and/or log output.

github.com/mutagen-io/mutagen/cmd/mutage.overview: Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Improper Input Validation such that on Windows, the shell is resolved using the standard %ComSpec% mechanism, with a fallback to a %PATH%-based search for cmd.exe. %ComSpec% could, in theory, be set maliciously.

open-cluster-management.io/registration-.overview: Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Privilege Escalation when a user has access to the worker nodes which has the cluster-manager-registration-controller or cluster-manager deployments. A malicious user can take advantage of this and bind the cluster-admin to any service account or use the service account to list all secrets for all kubernetes namespaces, leading to a cluster-level privilege escalation.

github.com/open-cluster-management-io/re.overview: Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Privilege Escalation when a user has access to the worker nodes which has the cluster-manager-registration-controller or cluster-manager deployments. A malicious user can take advantage of this and bind the cluster-admin to any service account or use the service account to list all secrets for all kubernetes namespaces, leading to a cluster-level privilege escalation.

github.com/googlecloudplatform/esp-v2.remediation: Upgrade github.com/GoogleCloudPlatform/esp-v2 to version 2.43.0 or higher.
github.com/googlecloudplatform/esp-v2.overview:
Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Improper Authentication such that API clients can craft a malicious X-HTTP-Method-Override header value to bypass JWT authentication in specific cases.
ESPv2 allows malicious requests to bypass authentication if both conditions are true: 

the requested HTTP method is not in the API service definition (OpenAPI spec or gRPC google.api.http proto annotations
the specified X-HTTP-Method-Override is a valid HTTP method in the API service definition. ESPv2 will forward the request to your backend without checking the JWT.

Note: Restricting API access with API keys works as intended and is not affected by this vulnerability.

github.com/metal3-io/baremetal-operator.remediation: Upgrade github.com/metal3-io/baremetal-operator to version 0.3.0 or higher.
github.com/metal3-io/baremetal-operator.overview: Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Information Exposure such that the plain-text username and hashed password are readable by anyone having a cluster-wide read-access to the management cluster, or access to the management cluster's Etcd storage.

github.com/kubewarden/kubewarden-control.overview:
github.com/kubewarden/kubewarden-controller is a Kubernetes Dynamic Admission Controller that uses policies written in WebAssembly
Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Improper Privilege Management that allows attackers with access to the ServiceAccount to read arbitrary secrets that are visible to the kubewarden-controller-manager-cluster-role ClusterRole.

github.com/kubewarden/kubewarden-controller/controllers is a Kubernetes Dynamic Admission Controller that uses policies written in WebAssembly
Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Improper Privilege Management that allows attackers with access to the ServiceAccount to read arbitrary secrets that are visible to the kubewarden-controller-manager-cluster-role ClusterRole.

www.velocidex.com/golang/velociraptor/vq.overview:
www.velocidex.com/golang/velociraptor/vql/parsers is an a tool for collecting host based state information using Velocidex Query Language (VQL) queries.
Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Denial of Service (DoS). Due to insufficient validation in the PE and OLE parsers attacker can crash Velociraptor during parsing of maliciously malformed files. For this attack to succeed, the attacker needs to be able to introduce malicious files to the system at the same time that Velociraptor attempts to collect any artifacts that attempt to parse PE files, Authenticode signatures, or OLE files. After crashing, the Velociraptor service will restart and it will still be possible to collect other artifacts.

github.com/clusternet/clusternet/pkg/con.overview:
github.com/clusternet/clusternet/pkg/controllers/clusters/clusterlifecycle/discovery is a managing your Kubernetes clusters (including public, private, edge, etc.) as easily as visiting the Internet.
Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Privilege Escalation due to a deployment called cluster-hub inside the clusternet-system Kubernetes namespace, which runs on worker nodes randomly. The deployment has a service account called clusternet-hub, which has a cluster role called clusternet:hub via cluster role binding. The clusternet:hub cluster role has * verbs of *.* resources. Thus, if a malicious user can access the worker node which runs the clusternet, they can leverage the service account to take malicious actions on critical system resources.

github.com/golang/crypto.remediation: Upgrade github.com/golang/crypto to version 0.1.0 or higher.
github.com/golang/crypto.overview:
github.com/golang/crypto is a SSH client and server
Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Denial of Service (DoS) such that on 32-bit architectures, a malformed input to crypto/x509 or the ASN.1 parsing functions of golang.org/x/crypto/cryptobyte can lead to a panic. The malformed certificate can be delivered via a crypto/tls connection to a client, or to a server that accepts client certificates. 
Note:
net/http clients can be made to crash by an HTTPS server, while net/http servers that accept client certificates will recover the panic and are unaffected.

github.com/docker/docker.remediation: There is no fixed version for github.com/docker/docker.
github.com/docker/docker.overview:
Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Denial of Service (DoS). Encrypted overlay networks on affected configurations silently accept cleartext VXLAN datagrams that are tagged with the VNI of an encrypted overlay network. As a result, it is possible to inject arbitrary Ethernet frames into the encrypted overlay network by encapsulating them in VXLAN datagrams.
A sophisticated attacker may be able to establish a UDP or TCP connection by way of the container’s outbound gateway that would otherwise be blocked by a stateful firewall or carry out other escalations beyond simple injection by smuggling packets into the overlay network.
Note:
Patches are available in Moby releases 23.0.3, and 20.10.24. As Mirantis Container Runtime's 20.10 releases are numbered differently, users of that platform should update to 20.10.16.

github.com/docker/docker.remediation: There is no fixed version for github.com/docker/docker.
github.com/docker/docker.overview:
Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Unprotected Alternate Channel. Encrypted overlay networks silently accept cleartext VXLAN datagrams that are tagged with the VNI of an encrypted overlay network. As a result, it is possible to inject arbitrary Ethernet frames into the encrypted overlay network by encapsulating them in VXLAN datagrams. 
Note:
Patches are available in Moby releases 23.0.3, and 20.10.24. As Mirantis Container Runtime's 20.10 releases are numbered differently, users of that platform should update to 20.10.16.

github.com/docker/docker.remediation: There is no fixed version for github.com/docker/docker.
github.com/docker/docker.overview:
Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Missing Encryption of Sensitive Data because iptables rules that enforce both incoming and outgoing IPSec to be encrypted are not created when xt_u32 is unavailable, even though the container is still attached to the network. And so, encrypted overlay networks on affected platforms silently transmit unencrypted data. 
As a result, overlay networks may appear to be functional, passing traffic as expected, but without any of the expected confidentiality or data integrity guarantees.
Exploiting this vulnerability allows an attacker sitting in a trusted position on the network to read all of the application traffic that is moving across the overlay network.
Note:
Patches are available in Moby releases 23.0.3, and 20.10.24. As Mirantis Container Runtime's 20.10 releases are numbered differently, users of that platform should update to 20.10.16.

Affected version of github.com/docker/docker are vulnerable to Symlink Attacks.
Libcontainer and Docker Engine before 1.6.1 opens the file-descriptor passed to the pid-1 process before performing the chroot, which allows local users to gain privileges via a symlink attack in an image.

Affected version of github.com/docker/docker are vulnerable to Arbitrary File Write.
Libcontainer 1.6.0, as used in Docker Engine, allows local users to escape containerization ("mount namespace breakout") and write to arbitrary file on the host system via a symlink attack in an image when respawning a container.

Affected version of github.com/docker/docker are vulnerable to Information Exposure.
Docker Engine before 1.6.1 uses weak permissions for (1) /proc/asound, (2) /proc/timer_stats, (3) /proc/latency_stats, and (4) /proc/fs, which allows local users to modify the host, obtain sensitive information, and perform protocol downgrade attacks via a crafted image.

Affected version of github.com/docker/docker are vulnerable to Arbitrary File Override.
Docker Engine before 1.6.1 allows local users to set arbitrary Linux Security Modules (LSM) and docker_t policies via an image that allows volumes to override files in /proc.

Affected version of github.com/docker/docker are vulnerable to Directory Traversal attacks.Docker before 1.3.3 does not properly validate image IDs, which allows remote attackers to conduct path traversal attacks and spoof repositories via a crafted image in a (1) "docker load" operation or (2) "registry communications."

Affected version of github.com/docker/docker are vulnerable to Directory Traversal attacks when processing of absolute symlinks. Only relative links were considered while checking symlinks for traversals. An attacker could exploit this archive extraction or through volume mounts.

Affected version of github.com/docker/docker are vulnerable to Arbitrary Code Execution attacks.
Docker 1.3.2 allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code with root privileges via a crafted (1) image or (2) build in a Dockerfile in an LZMA (.xz) archive, related to the chroot for archive extraction.

Affected version of github.com/docker/docker are vulnerable to Arbitrary Code Execution.
Docker before 1.3.2 allows remote attackers to write to arbitrary files and execute arbitrary code via a (1) symlink or (2) hard link attack in an image archive in a (a) pull or (b) load operation.

Affected version of github.com/docker/docker are vulnerable to Access Restriction Bypass.
Docker 1.3.0 through 1.3.1 allows remote attackers to modify the default run profile of image containers and possibly bypass the container by applying unspecified security options to an image.

Affected version of github.com/docker/docker are vulnerable to HTTP downgrade attacks.
Docker before 1.3.1 and docker-py before 0.5.3 fall back to HTTP when the HTTPS connection to the registry fails, which allows man-in-the-middle attackers to conduct downgrade attacks and obtain authentication and image data by leveraging a network position between the client and the registry to block HTTPS traffic.

Affected version of github.com/docker/docker are vulnerable to Privilege Escalation.
Docker 1.0.0 uses world-readable and world-writable permissions on the management socket, which allows local users to gain privileges via unspecified vectors.

github.com/moby/moby.remediation: Upgrade github.com/moby/moby to version 19.3.15, 20.10.3 or higher.
github.com/moby/moby.overview: Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Privilege Escalation. There is a vulnerability in Docker involving the --userns-remap option in which access to remapped root allows privilege escalation to real root. When using --userns-remap, if the root user in the remapped namespace has access to the host filesystem they can modify files under /var/lib/docker/<remapping> that cause writing files with extended privileges.

github.com/moby/moby.remediation: Upgrade github.com/moby/moby to version 19.3.15, 20.10.3 or higher.
github.com/moby/moby.overview: Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Denial of Service (DoS). There is a vulnerability in Docker in which pulling an intentionally malformed Docker image manifest crashes the dockerd daemon.

github.com/moby/moby.remediation: Upgrade moby to version 17.3.2-ce or higher.
github.com/moby/moby.overview:
github.com/moby/moby is a collaborative project for the container ecosystem to assemble container-based systems.
Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Authentication Bypass. The Docker engine validated a client TLS certificate using both the configured client CA root certificate and all system roots on non-Windows systems. This allowed a client with any domain validated certificate signed by a system-trusted root CA to authenticate.

github.com/nginx/agent/v2/src/core.remediation: Upgrade github.com/nginx/agent/v2/src/core to version 2.23.3 or higher.
github.com/nginx/agent/v2/src/core.overview:

Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Insertion of Sensitive Information into Log File because it inserts sensitive information into a log file. An authenticated attacker with local access to read agent log files may gain access to private keys.
Note:
Exploiting this vulnerability is only possible when the non-default trace level logging is enabled.

github.com/goauthentik/authentik.remediation: Upgrade github.com/goauthentik/authentik to version 2022.10.4, 2022.11.4 or higher.
github.com/goauthentik/authentik.overview:
Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Improper Authentication such that token reuse in invitation URLs leads to access control bypass via the usage of a different enrollment flow than the one provided. The vulnerability allows an attacker that knows different invitation flows names (e.g. enrollment-invitation-test and enrollment-invitation-admin) via either different invite links or via brute forcing to signup via a single invitation URL for any valid invite link received (it can even be a URL for a third flow as long as it's a valid invite). The token used in the Invitations section of the Admin interface does NOT change when a different enrollment flow is selected via the interface and it is NOT bound to the selected flow, so it will be valid for any flow when used. 
Note:
Only configurations that use invitations and have multiple enrollments flows with invitation stages that grant different permissions are affected. The default configuration is not vulnerable, and neither are configurations with a single enrollment flow.

goauthentik.io.remediation: Upgrade goauthentik.io to version 2022.10.4, 2022.11.4 or higher.
goauthentik.io.overview:
Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Improper Authentication such that token reuse in invitation URLs leads to access control bypass via the usage of a different enrollment flow than the one provided. The vulnerability allows an attacker that knows different invitation flows names (e.g. enrollment-invitation-test and enrollment-invitation-admin) via either different invite links or via brute forcing to signup via a single invitation URL for any valid invite link received (it can even be a URL for a third flow as long as it's a valid invite). The token used in the Invitations section of the Admin interface does NOT change when a different enrollment flow is selected via the interface and it is NOT bound to the selected flow, so it will be valid for any flow when used. 
Note:
Only configurations that use invitations and have multiple enrollments flows with invitation stages that grant different permissions are affected. The default configuration is not vulnerable, and neither are configurations with a single enrollment flow.

goauthentik.io.remediation: Upgrade goauthentik.io to version 2022.10.4, 2022.11.4 or higher.
goauthentik.io.overview: Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Improper Privilege Management by allowing any authenticated user to create an arbitrary number of accounts through the default flows.

github.com/kitabisa/teler-waf.overview:
github.com/kitabisa/teler-waf is an omprehensive security solution for Go-based web applications. It acts as an HTTP middleware, providing an easy-to-use interface for integrating IDS functionality with teler IDS into existing Go applications. By using teler-waf, you can help protect against a variety of web-based attacks, such as cross-site scripting (XSS) and SQL injection.

github.com/facebook/fbthrift/thrift/lib/.remediation: Upgrade github.com/facebook/fbthrift/thrift/lib/go/thrift to version c461c1bd1a3e130b181aa9c854da3030cd4b5156 or higher.
github.com/facebook/fbthrift/thrift/lib/.overview:
github.com/facebook/fbthrift/thrift/lib/go/thrift is a Facebook's branch of Apache Thrift, including a new C++ server.
Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Denial of Service (DoS). It servers would not error upon receiving messages with containers of fields of unknown type. As a result, malicious clients could send short messages which would take a long time for the server to parse, potentially leading to denial of service.

github.com/ipfs/go-bitfield.remediation: Upgrade github.com/ipfs/go-bitfield to version 1.1.0 or higher.
github.com/ipfs/go-bitfield.overview:
Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Improper Input Validation such that when feeding untrusted user input into the size parameter of NewBitfield and FromBytes functions, an attacker can trigger panics. This happens when the size is a not a multiple of 8 or is negative. 
Note: Users unable to upgrade should ensure that size is a multiple of 8 before calling NewBitfield or FromBytes.

github.com/ipfs/go-unixfs/hamt.remediation: Upgrade github.com/ipfs/go-unixfs/hamt to version 0.4.3 or higher.
github.com/ipfs/go-unixfs/hamt.overview: Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Denial of Service (DoS) via the fanout parameter, such that trying to read malformed HAMT sharded directories can cause panics and virtual memory leaks.

github.com/ipfs/go-unixfsnode/hamt.remediation: Upgrade github.com/ipfs/go-unixfsnode/hamt to version 1.5.2 or higher.
github.com/ipfs/go-unixfsnode/hamt.overview: Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Denial of Service (DoS) via the fanout parameter, such that trying to read malformed HAMT sharded directories can cause panics and virtual memory leaks.

github.com/hashicorp/boundary/internal/c.overview: Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Cleartext Storage of Sensitive Information when using a PKI-based worker with a Key Management Service (KMS) defined in the configuration file. The newly created credentials after an automatic rotation may not have been encrypted via the intended KMS. This would result in the credentials being stored in plaintext on the Boundary PKI worker’s disk.

github.com/nothub/mrpack-install/cmd.remediation: Upgrade github.com/nothub/mrpack-install/cmd to version 0.16.3 or higher.
github.com/nothub/mrpack-install/cmd.overview:
github.com/nothub/mrpack-install/cmd is a cli application for installing Minecraft servers and Modrinth modpacks
Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Directory Traversal by convincing a user to import a malicious .mrpack file, which allows scripts or config files to be written or overwritten.

github.com/answerdev/answer/internal/bas.overview: Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Cross-site Scripting (XSS) due to improper user-input sanitization, by allowing attackers to upload files containing malicious HTML code.

github.com/answerdev/answer/internal/rep.overview: Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Race Condition such that malicious users can attack and break the limits of other users' question collections, resulting in too many or negative collections.

github.com/anchore/syft/internal/config.remediation: Upgrade github.com/anchore/syft/internal/config to version 0.70.0 or higher.
github.com/anchore/syft/internal/config.overview:
github.com/anchore/syft/internal/config is a library for generating a Software Bill of Materials from container images and filesystems
Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Credential Exposure by exposing the contents of the SYFT_ATTEST_PASSWORD, whether or not the attest command is in use. An attacker can view this stored password using the syft command with the -vv or -vvv option, or in an SBOM attestation using the syft-json format.

golang.org/x/sys/unix.remediation: Upgrade golang.org/x/sys/unix to version 0.1.0 or higher.
golang.org/x/sys/unix.overview: Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Incorrect Privilege Assignment such that when called with a non-zero flags parameter, the Faccessat function can incorrectly report that a file is accessible.

github.com/hakobe/paranoidhttp.remediation: Upgrade github.com/hakobe/paranoidhttp to version 0.3.0 or higher.
github.com/hakobe/paranoidhttp.overview: Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Server-side Request Forgery (SSRF) due to [::] which is equivalent to the 127.0.0.1 address, but does not match the filter for private addresses.

fortio.org/proxy/rp.remediation: Upgrade fortio.org/proxy/rp to version 1.6.1 or higher.
fortio.org/proxy/rp.overview:
fortio.org/proxy/rp is a Fortio simple TLS/ingress autocert proxy
Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Information Exposure via the debug-host feature.

fortio.org/proxy.remediation: Upgrade fortio.org/proxy to version 1.6.1 or higher.
fortio.org/proxy.overview:
fortio.org/proxy is a Fortio simple TLS/ingress autocert proxy
Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Information Exposure via the debug-host feature.

github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/util/session.remediation: Upgrade github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/util/session to version 1.5.1 or higher.
github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/util/session.overview:
github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/util/session is a Declarative continuous deployment for Kubernetes.
Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to User Enumeration. It is possible for attackers to determine the usernames of valid (non-SSO) accounts within Argo.

github.com/rancher/wrangler/pkg/git.remediation: Upgrade github.com/rancher/wrangler/pkg/git to version 0.7.4-security1, 0.8.5-security1, 0.8.11, 1.0.1 or higher.
github.com/rancher/wrangler/pkg/git.overview:
Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Denial of Service (DoS) when processing Git credentials.
Specially crafted Git credentials can result in a denial of service (DoS) attack on an application that uses Wrangler due to the exhaustion of the available memory and CPU resources. This is caused by a lack of input validation of Git credentials before they are used, which may lead to a denial of service in some cases. This issue can be triggered when accessing both private and public Git repositories.

github.com/helloxz/zdir.remediation: A fix was pushed into the master branch but not yet published.
github.com/helloxz/zdir.overview:
github.com/helloxz/zdir is a directory listing program.
Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Arbitrary File Upload via the /api/upload component. This allows attackers to execute arbitrary code via a crafted .ssh file.

github.com/go-sonic/sonic/service/impl.remediation: Upgrade github.com/go-sonic/sonic/service/impl to version 1.0.5 or higher.
github.com/go-sonic/sonic/service/impl.overview:
github.com/go-sonic/sonic/service/impl is an a blogging platform developed by Go.
Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Directory Traversal via the /admin/backups/work-dir component.

github.com/nektos/act/pkg/artifacts.remediation: Upgrade github.com/nektos/act/pkg/artifacts to version 0.2.40 or higher.
github.com/nektos/act/pkg/artifacts.overview:
github.com/nektos/act/pkg/artifacts is a package for running GitHub Actions locally
Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Arbitrary File Upload via Github Action artifacts uploaded through the /upload endpoint, which are accepted and passed to os.Mkdir and os.Open without sanitizing path inputs. This may lead to privilege escalation.

www.velocidex.com/golang/velociraptor/vq.remediation: A fix was pushed into the master branch but not yet published.
www.velocidex.com/golang/velociraptor/vq.overview:
www.velocidex.com/golang/velociraptor/vql/filesystem is an advanced digital forensic and incident response tool
Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Authorization Bypass in the VQL copy() function, which applies permission checks for reading files but does not check for permission to write files. This allows a low privilege user to overwrite files on the server, including Velociraptor configuration files.

www.velocidex.com/golang/velociraptor/vq.remediation: A fix was pushed into the master branch but not yet published.
www.velocidex.com/golang/velociraptor/vq.overview:
www.velocidex.com/golang/velociraptor/vql/filesystem is an advanced digital forensic and incident response tool
Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Directory Traversal due to not properly sanitizing the client ID parameter to the CreateCollection API. An attacker with an account of at least "investigator" level, can provide a client id of "../clients/server" to schedule the collection as a server artifact, but only require privileges to schedule collections on the client.

www.velocidex.com/golang/velociraptor/se.remediation: A fix was pushed into the master branch but not yet published.
www.velocidex.com/golang/velociraptor/se.overview:
www.velocidex.com/golang/velociraptor/services/launcher is an advanced digital forensic and incident response tool
Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Directory Traversal due to not properly sanitizing the client ID parameter to the CreateCollection API. An attacker with an account of at least "investigator" level, can provide a client id of "../clients/server" to schedule the collection as a server artifact, but only require privileges to schedule collections on the client.

github.com/sylabs/scs-library-client/cli.overview: Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Insufficiently Protected Credentials via the httpGetRangeRequest function, when the HTTP Authorization header is sent by the client to the library service while pulling a container image. The vulnerability is exploitable in a specific flow where the library service redirects the client to a backing S3 storage server to perform a multi-part concurrent download, which might result in sensitive information being incorrectly leaked to an S3 backing storage provider.

github.com/bits-and-blooms/bloom/v3.overview: Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Uncontrolled Search Path Element by allowing an attacker to redirect the user to a malicious repository.

github.com/bits-and-blooms/bloom.remediation: Upgrade github.com/bits-and-blooms/bloom to version 3.3.1 or higher.
github.com/bits-and-blooms/bloom.overview: Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Uncontrolled Search Path Element by allowing an attacker to redirect the user to a malicious repository.

github.com/zitadel/zitadel/internal.remediation: Upgrade github.com/zitadel/zitadel/internal to version 2.16.4, 2.17.3 or higher.
github.com/zitadel/zitadel/internal.overview: Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Insufficient Session Expiration such that RefreshTokens parameter is not invalidated when a user is locked or deactivated. The deactivated or locked user is able to obtain a valid access token only through a refresh token grant. If the locked or deactivated user’s session is already terminated (“logged out”) then it is not possible to create a new session. Renewal of access token through a refresh token grant is limited to the configured amount of time (RefreshTokenExpiration).

github.com/gotify/server/v2/docs.remediation: Upgrade github.com/gotify/server/v2/docs to version 2.2.3 or higher.
github.com/gotify/server/v2/docs.overview:
github.com/gotify/server/v2/docs is a documentation of the Gotify REST-API.
Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Cross-site Scripting (XSS) via an outdated instance of the Swagger UI API documentation frontend at /docs. Exploiting this vulnerability is possible when loading external Swagger config files.

github.com/kubeoperator/kubepi/internal/.overview:
github.com/KubeOperator/kubepi/internal/api/v1 is a modern K8s panel.
KubePi allows administrators to import multiple Kubernetes clusters and assign permissions for different clusters and namespaces to specified users through permission control. It allows developers to manage and troubleshoot applications running in a Kubernetes cluster, allowing developers to handle the complexities in a Kubernetes cluster better.
Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Session Fixation which allows an attacker to hijack a legitimate user session.

github.com/KubeOperator/kubepi/internal/api/v1 is a modern K8s panel.
KubePi allows administrators to import multiple Kubernetes clusters and assign permissions for different clusters and namespaces to specified users through permission control. It allows developers to manage and troubleshoot applications running in a Kubernetes cluster, allowing developers to handle the complexities in a Kubernetes cluster better.
Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Missing Authorization when sp.Post("/login/logs/search", handler.LoginLogsSearch()) and sp.Post("/operation/logs/search", handler.OperationLogsSearch()) directly use the v1 route without middleware authentication.

github.com/kubeoperator/kubeoperator/pkg.overview:
github.com/KubeOperator/KubeOperator/pkg/router/v1 is an open source, lightweight Kubernetes distribution focused on helping enterprises plan, deploy, and operate production-level Kubernetes clusters.
Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Information Exposure via the downloadKubeconfig and V1 functions, which implement routes without any validations or restrictions.

github.com/usememos/memos/web/src.remediation: Upgrade github.com/usememos/memos/web/src to version 0.10.0 or higher.
github.com/usememos/memos/web/src.overview: Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Cross-site Scripting (XSS) due to missing input sanitization in the link markdown.

github.com/usememos/memos/web/src.remediation: Upgrade github.com/usememos/memos/web/src to version 0.10.0 or higher.

github.com/agnivade/easy-scrypt.overview: Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Timing Attack via the function VerifyPassphrase.

github.com/kubeoperator/kubepi/internal.remediation: Upgrade github.com/KubeOperator/kubepi/internal to version 1.6.3 or higher.
github.com/kubeoperator/kubepi/internal.overview: Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Information Exposure due to the JWT authentication function using hard-coded JWTsigkeys, resulting in the same JWTsigkeys for all online projects. This means that an attacker can forge any JWT token to take over the administrator account of any online project. Furthermore, they may use the administrator to take over the k8s cluster of the target enterprise.

github.com/ipld/go-ipld-prime/codec/dagj.overview:
Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Improper Input Validation such that, encoding data which contains a Bytes kind Node will pass a Bytes token to the JSON encoder which will panic as it does not expect to receive Bytes tokens. 
Note: This issue only impacts uses of the json codec. Using dag-json or json as a decoder does not impact the user.

mellium.im/sasl.remediation: Upgrade mellium.im/sasl to version 0.3.1 or higher.
mellium.im/sasl.overview:
mellium.im/sasl is a Go library implementing the Simple Authentication and Security Layer (SASL) as defined by RFC 4422.
Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Missing Critical Step in Authentication if the remote side of a SCRAM-based connection advertises support for channel binding, since an empty nonce is used. If paired with a remote end that does not validate the length of the nonce, this could lead to insufficient randomness being used during authentication.

github.com/azure/aad-pod-identity/pkg/nm.overview: Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Improper Restriction of Security Token Assignment such that a token request made with backslash in the request (example: /metadata/identity\oauth2\token/) would bypass the NMI validation and be sent to IMDS allowing a pod in the cluster to access identities that it shouldn't have access to.

Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Authorization Bypass if the model is using a tuple with a wildcard (*) assigned to a tupleset relation (the right hand side of a ‘from’ statement).

github.com/bradleyfalzon/ghinstallation.vul_name: Generation of Error Message Containing Sensitive Information

github.com/bradleyfalzon/ghinstallation.overview:
github.com/bradleyfalzon/ghinstallation is a module to provide authentication as an installation for GitHub Apps
Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Generation of Error Message Containing Sensitive Information in that it returns the contents of the JWT in the error response when a request to refresh an installation token fails.
Note:
This vulnerability was fixed in the 2.0.0 release.

github.com/csaf-poc/csaf_distribution/ut.overview: Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Cross-site Scripting (XSS) due to improper user-input sanitization, via a crafted CSAF document uploaded as text/html. The endpoint upload allows valid CSAF advisories (JSON format) to be uploaded with Content-Type text/html and filenames ending in .html. When subsequently accessed via web browser, these advisories are served and interpreted as HTML pages. Such uploaded advisories can contain JavaScript code that will execute within the browser context of users inspecting the advisory.

Such uploaded advisories can contain JavaScript code that will execute within the browser context of users inspecting the advisory.

github.com/kitabisa/teler/internal/event.overview:

Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Cross-site Scripting (XSS) in the dashboard, via the /events endpoint. Attackers can expose information by exploiting this based on detected threats if the log contains a DOM scripting payload.

teler.app/internal/event/www.remediation: Upgrade teler.app/internal/event/www to version 2.0.0-rc.4, 2.0.0-dev.2 or higher.

github.com/clastix/capsule/pkg/webhook.remediation: Upgrade github.com/clastix/capsule/pkg/webhook to version 0.1.3 or higher.
github.com/clastix/capsule/pkg/webhook.overview: Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Privilege Escalation. An attacker could detach the Namespace from a Tenant that is forbidden to start privileged Pods using the Pod Security labels by removing the OwnerReference, removing the enforcement labels, and being able to start privileged containers, triggering generic Kubernetes privilege escalation.

github.com/grafana/synthetic-monitoring-.overview:
github.com/grafana/synthetic-monitoring-agent/cmd/synthetic-monitoring-agent is a worker for Grafana's Synthetic Monitoring application
Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Information Exposure via the debug pprof  endpoint, which exposes the authentication token used to communicate with the Synthetic Monitoring API. 
Note: This vulnerability can be worked around by reviewing the agent settings in /etc/synthetic-monitoring/synthetic-monitoring-agent.conf and setting the HTTP listening address to localhost or a non-routed network, with the command line parameter -listen-address.

github.com/prometheus/exporter-toolkit/w.overview:
github.com/prometheus/exporter-toolkit/web is an utility package to build exporters
Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Incorrect Implementation of Authentication Algorithm which makes it possible for an attacker with access to a Prometheus web.yml file and users' bcrypted passwords to authenticate against Prometheus. Exploiting this vulnerability is possible due to a security bypass in the built-in authentication cache.

github.com/benc-uk/kubeview/web/client/s.remediation: There is no fixed version for github.com/benc-uk/kubeview/web/client/src/mixins.
github.com/benc-uk/kubeview/web/client/s.overview: Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Access Restriction Bypass because api/scrape/kube-system does not require authentication, and retrieves certificate files that can be used for authentication as kube-admin. It can allow attackers to obtain control of a Kubernetes cluster.

github.com/sourcegraph/sourcegraph/cmd/g.overview: Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Arbitrary Command Injection via the host parameter on the /list-gitolite endpoint. An attacker can inject commands by sending local requests to the vulnerable endpoint.
Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Arbitrary Command Execution via the customGitFetch feature, which is enabled by default.

Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Arbitrary Code Execution in the gitserver service. An administrator who is able to edit or add a Gitolite code host and has administrative access to Sourcegraph’s bundled Grafana instance can change this command arbitrarily and run it remotely. This grants direct access to the infrastructure underlying the Sourcegraph installation.

github.com/sourcegraph/sourcegraph/enter.overview: Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Arbitrary Code Execution in the gitserver service. An administrator who is able to edit or add a Gitolite code host and has administrative access to Sourcegraph’s bundled Grafana instance can change this command arbitrarily and run it remotely. This grants direct access to the infrastructure underlying the Sourcegraph installation.

github.com/sourcegraph/sourcegraph/cmd/g.overview: Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Remote Code Execution (RCE) in the gitserver service, which fails to properly restrict calling git config. It allows attackers to set the git core.sshCommand option, which sets Git to use the specified command instead of ssh when they need to connect to a remote system.

github.com/codenotary/immudb/pkg/client.remediation: Upgrade github.com/codenotary/immudb/pkg/client to version 1.4.1 or higher.
github.com/codenotary/immudb/pkg/client.overview: Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Insufficient Verification of Data Authenticity immudb client SDKs use server's UUID to distinguish between different server instances so that the client can connect to different immudb instances and keep the state for multiple servers. SDK does not validate this uuid and can accept any value reported by the server. A malicious server can change the reported UUID tricking the client to treat it as a different server thus accepting a state completely irrelevant to the one previously retrieved from the server.

github.com/codenotary/immudb/pkg/client.remediation: Upgrade github.com/codenotary/immudb/pkg/client to version 1.4.1 or higher.
github.com/codenotary/immudb/pkg/client.overview:
Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Insufficient Verification of Data Authenticity. A malicious immudb server can provide falsified proof that will be accepted by the client SDK signing a falsified transaction replacing the genuine one. This situation can not be triggered by a genuine immudb server and requires the client to perform a specific list of verified operations resulting in the acceptance of an invalid state value.
Note: This vulnerability only affects immudb client SDKs, the immudb server itself is not affected by this vulnerability.

knative.dev/func/buildpacks.remediation: Upgrade knative.dev/func/buildpacks to version 1.8.1 or higher.
knative.dev/func/buildpacks.overview:
Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Information Exposure when users are using a malicious or compromised third-party buildpack which can then expose their registry credentials or local docker socket to a malicious lifecycle container.
Note: This issue only affects users who are using function buildpacks from third-parties.

github.com/yi-ge/unzip.vul_name: Arbitrary File Write via Archive Extraction (Zip Slip)
github.com/yi-ge/unzip.remediation: A fix was pushed into the master branch but not yet published.
github.com/yi-ge/unzip.overview:
github.com/yi-ge/unzip is a Golang *.zip decompress package. This package is a fork from https://github.com/artdarek/go-unzip with added support for Symlinks.
Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Arbitrary File Write via Archive Extraction (Zip Slip) due to improper path sanitization, so archives containing relative file paths can cause files to be written (or overwritten) outside of the target directory.

github.com/yi-ge/unzip.vul_name: Arbitrary File Write via Archive Extraction (Zip Slip)
github.com/yi-ge/unzip.remediation: There is no fixed version for github.com/yi-ge/unzip.
github.com/yi-ge/unzip.overview:
github.com/yi-ge/unzip is a Golang *.zip decompress package. This package is a fork from https://github.com/artdarek/go-unzip with added support for Symlinks.
Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Arbitrary File Write via Archive Extraction (Zip Slip).
ZIP Path traversal is possible during extraction due to no validation and sanitization of filenames.
PoC
package main
import ("github.com/yi-ge/unzip"
"fmt")

func main() {
u := unzip.New("/home/snoopy/zip-slip.zip", "/home/snoopy/uploads")
err := u.Extract()
if err != nil {
fmt.Println(err)
}
}

github.com/masterminds/goutils.remediation: Upgrade github.com/masterminds/goutils to version 1.1.1 or higher.
github.com/masterminds/goutils.overview:
github.com/masterminds/goutils is a provides users with utility functions to manipulate strings in various ways.
Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Insecure Randomness when randomly-generated alphanumeric strings contain significantly less entropy than expected, the RandomAlphaNumeric and CryptoRandomAlphaNumeric functions always return strings containing at least one digit from 0 to 9. This significantly reduces the amount of entropy in short strings generated by these functions.

github.com/masterminds/goutils.remediation: Upgrade github.com/masterminds/goutils to version 1.1.1 or higher.
github.com/masterminds/goutils.overview:
github.com/masterminds/goutils is a provides users with utility functions to manipulate strings in various ways.
Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Insecure Randomness via the RandomAlphaNumeric(int) and CryptoRandomAlphaNumeric(int) functions. Small values of int in the functions above will return a smaller subset of results than they should. For example, RandomAlphaNumeric(1) would always return a digit in the 0-9 range, while RandomAlphaNumeric(4) return around ~7 million of the ~13M possible permutations.

github.com/go-vela/worker/runtime.remediation: Upgrade github.com/go-vela/worker/runtime to version 0.16.0 or higher.
github.com/go-vela/worker/runtime.overview:
Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Insecure Defaults which allows exploitation and container breakouts.
The following default configurations are impacted:

Default Privileged Images

When the target/vela-docker plugin will run as a privileged container, even if the Vela administrators did not intend to allow for any privileged plugins and even if the vela.yml configuration file does not use the privileged = True flag.
Exploiting this vulnerability allows a malicious user to easily break out of the container and access the worker host operating system.

Default Allowed Repositories

When it allows anyone with a GitHub account (or other enabled source control management solution) to enable a repository within Vela and run builds, this means that if a Vela instance is accessible to the public, a third party could add their own malicious repositories to the Vela instance and run arbitrary code.

Default Enabled Events allow Pull Requests

The default configurations allow anyone who can issue a pull request against a repository to trigger a Vela job.

github.com/sigstore/cosign/cmd/cosign/cl.overview:
github.com/sigstore/cosign/cmd/cosign/cli/verify is a package that aims to make signatures invisible infrastructure.
Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Denial of Service (DoS) due to several vulnerabilities in cosign verify-blob that will successfully verify an artifact when verification should have failed.
This vulnerability exists due to the following:

A cosign bundle can be crafted to successfully verify a blob even if the embedded rekorBundle does not reference the given signature. 

When providing identity flags, the email and issuer of a certificate are not checked when verifying a Rekor bundle, and the GitHub Actions identity is never checked. 

When providing an invalid Rekor bundle, the experimental flag is successfully verified without any check. 

When an invalid transparency log entry will result in immediate success for verification.

github.com/sigstore/cosign/cmd/cosign/cli/verify is a package that aims to make signatures invisible infrastructure.
Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Cryptographic Issues when signing with a standard keypair and with "keyless" signing with Fulcio.

github.com/sigstore/cosign/cmd/cosign/cli/verify is a package that aims to make signatures invisible infrastructure.
Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Improper Certificate Validation by making it claim that an entry for a signature exists in the Rekor transparency log even if it doesn't. This requires the attacker to have pull and push permissions for the signature in OCI. This can happen with both standard signing with a keypair and "keyless signing" with Fulcio.

github.com/moby/moby/daemon.remediation: Upgrade github.com/moby/moby/daemon to version 20.10.18 or higher.
github.com/moby/moby/daemon.overview: Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Information Exposure because supplementary groups were not set up correctly. If attackers have direct access to a container and manipulate their supplementary group access, they may be able to use supplementary group access to bypass primary group restrictions in some cases, potentially gaining access to sensitive information or gaining the ability to execute code in that container.

github.com/moby/moby/daemon.vul_name: Incorrect Permission Assignment for Critical Resource
github.com/moby/moby/daemon.remediation: Upgrade github.com/moby/moby/daemon to version 20.10.14 or higher.
github.com/moby/moby/daemon.overview: Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Incorrect Permission Assignment for Critical Resource via containers that were incorrectly started with non-empty inheritable Linux process capabilities, creating an atypical Linux environment and enabling programs with inheritable file capabilities to elevate those capabilities to the permitted set during execve(2). Normally, when executable programs have specified permitted file capabilities, otherwise unprivileged users and processes can execute those programs and gain the specified file capabilities up to the bounding set. Due to this bug, containers which included executable programs with inheritable file capabilities allowed otherwise unprivileged users and processes to additionally gain these inheritable file capabilities up to the container's bounding set. Containers which use Linux users and groups to perform privilege separation inside the container are most directly impacted. This bug did not affect the container security sandbox as the inheritable set never contained more capabilities than were included in the container's bounding set. Running containers should be stopped, deleted, and recreated for the inheritable capabilities to be reset.

github.com/moby/moby/daemon.remediation: Upgrade github.com/moby/moby/daemon to version 20.10.9 or higher.
github.com/moby/moby/daemon.overview: Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Insecure Permissions. The data directory (typically /var/lib/docker) contained subdirectories with insufficiently restricted permissions, allowing otherwise unprivileged Linux users to traverse directory contents and execute programs.

github.com/gagliardetto/binary.remediation: Upgrade github.com/gagliardetto/binary to version 0.7.1 or higher.
github.com/gagliardetto/binary.overview: Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Denial of Service (DoS). When the dec.Decode(&val) method is used to parse data into a structure that is or contains slices of values, the length of the slice was previously read directly from the data itself without any checks on the size of it, and then a slice was allocated. This could lead to an overflow and an allocation of memory with excessive size value.

github.com/drakkan/sftpgo/v2/httpd.remediation: Upgrade github.com/drakkan/sftpgo/v2/httpd to version 2.3.4 or higher.
github.com/drakkan/sftpgo/v2/httpd.overview: Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Improper Authentication. An attacker who knows a user's password could potentially generate some recovery codes and then bypass two-factor authentication after it is enabled on the account at a later time.

github.com/drakkan/sftpgo/httpd.remediation: Upgrade github.com/drakkan/sftpgo/httpd to version 2.3.4 or higher.
github.com/drakkan/sftpgo/httpd.overview: Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Improper Authentication. An attacker who knows a user's password could potentially generate some recovery codes and then bypass two-factor authentication after it is enabled on the account at a later time.

github.com/openshift/cluster-authenticat.remediation: A fix was pushed into the master branch but not yet published.
github.com/openshift/cluster-authenticat.overview: Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Information Exposure. The private key for the external cluster certificate was stored incorrectly in the oauth-serving-cert ConfigMaps, and accessible to any authenticated OpenShift user or service-account. A malicious user could exploit this flaw by reading the oauth-serving-cert ConfigMap in the openshift-config-managed namespace, compromising any web traffic secured using that certificate.

github.com/fluxcd/flux2/cmd/flux.remediation: Upgrade github.com/fluxcd/flux2/cmd/flux to version 0.32.0 or higher.
github.com/fluxcd/flux2/cmd/flux.overview: Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Directory Traversal due to the improper sanitization of user-supplied input.

github.com/hashicorp/boundary/internal.remediation: Upgrade github.com/hashicorp/boundary/internal to version 0.10.2 or higher.
github.com/hashicorp/boundary/internal.overview: Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Privilege Escalation due to improper checks of data integrity to ensure that the resources are associated with the correct scopes.

github.com/hashicorp/boundary/internal/c.overview: Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Privilege Escalation due to improper checks of data integrity to ensure that the resources are associated with the correct scopes.

github.com/hashicorp/boundary/internal/b.overview: Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Privilege Escalation due to improper checks of data integrity to ensure that the resources are associated with the correct scopes.

github.com/dell/goiscsi.remediation: Upgrade github.com/dell/goiscsi to version 1.4.0 or higher.
github.com/dell/goiscsi.overview: Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to OS Command Injection. This is exploitable by a remote authenticated malicious user with low privileges.

github.com/dell/goiscsi.remediation: Upgrade github.com/dell/goiscsi to version 1.4.0 or higher.
github.com/dell/goiscsi.overview: Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Directory Traversal which allows a remote authenticated malicious user with low privileges to access a path outside of a restricted directory.

github.com/zitadel/zitadel/internal/comm.overview:
Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Improper Authorization due to a missing authorization check which allows users with the ORG_OWNER role to grant authorizations for projects that belong to other organisations inside the same Instance. 
Note:
Granting authorizations via API and Console is not affected by this vulnerability.

github.com/vmware-tanzu/pinniped/interna.overview: Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Insufficient Session Expiration due to a bug in this token exchange, the expiration time of the submitted access token was not checked correctly, causing expired access tokens to continue to be accepted by this endpoint until the user's backend session data is deleted.

go.pinniped.dev/internal/oidc.remediation: Upgrade go.pinniped.dev/internal/oidc to version 0.19.0 or higher.
go.pinniped.dev/internal/oidc.overview: Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Insufficient Session Expiration due to a bug in this token exchange, the expiration time of the submitted access token was not checked correctly, causing expired access tokens to continue to be accepted by this endpoint until the user's backend session data is deleted.

github.com/matrix-org/gomatrixserverlib.remediation: A fix was pushed into the master branch but not yet published.
github.com/matrix-org/gomatrixserverlib.overview:
github.com/matrix-org/gomatrixserverlib is a Go library for common functions needed by matrix servers.
Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Incorrect Authorization due to the power level parsing that fails to parse the events_default key of the m.room.power_levels event, changing the event's default power level to zero in all cases. This can result in events either being incorrectly authorized or rejected by Dendrite servers.
Note:
events_default power level, from Matrix rooms, with a default value of zero, is not vulnerable.

github.com/crypto-org-chain/cronos.vul_name: Exposure of Resource to Wrong Sphere
github.com/crypto-org-chain/cronos.remediation:
:
If it is not possible to upgrade to the fixed version, the user can redeploy the same contract, i.e. with identical bytecode, so that the original contract's code is recovered. The new contract deployment restores the bytecode hash -> bytecode entry in the internal state.
github.com/crypto-org-chain/cronos.overview:
github.com/crypto-org-chain/cronos is a Crypto.org EVM Chain which aims to massively scale the DeFi ecosystem. It is powered by Ethermint, a scalable and interoperable Ethereum, built on Proof-of-Stake with fast-finality using the Cosmos SDK.
Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Exposure of Resource to Wrong Sphere due to a bug in the DeleteAccount function, all contracts sharing identical bytecodes (i.e sharing the same CodeHash) will also stop working once one contract invokes selfdestruct, even though only a single contract invoked the selfdestruct OPCODE.

github.com/crypto-org-chain/cronos.remediation: Upgrade github.com/crypto-org-chain/cronos to version 0.6.5 or higher.
github.com/crypto-org-chain/cronos.overview:
github.com/crypto-org-chain/cronos is a Crypto.org EVM Chain which aims to massively scale the DeFi ecosystem. It is powered by Ethermint, a scalable and interoperable Ethereum, built on Proof-of-Stake with fast-finality using the Cosmos SDK.
Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Always-Incorrect Control Flow Implementation as it is possible to take transaction fees from Cosmos SDK's FeeCollector for the current block by sending a custom crafted MsgEthereumTx.
User funds and balances are safe.

github.com/sigstore/policy-controller/pk.overview: Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Cryptographic Issues when there is at least one attestation with a valid signature, and there are no attestations of the type being verified (--type defaults to "custom").

github.com/sourcegraph/sourcegraph/cmd/f.overview:
github.com/sourcegraph/sourcegraph/cmd/frontend/graphqlbackend is a code search and navigation engine.
Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Improper Authorization in the UpdateSavedSearch() function in saved_searches.go that allows a user to delete (but not read) another user's saved searches.

github.com/sourcegraph/sourcegraph/cmd/frontend/graphqlbackend is a code search and navigation engine.
Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Access Restriction Bypass. Strings in private source code could be guessed by an authenticated but unauthorized actor. This issue affects the Saved Searches and Code Monitoring features. A successful attack would require an authenticated bad actor to create many Saved Searches or Code Monitors to receive confirmation that a specific string exists. This could allow an attacker to guess formatted tokens in source code, such as API keys.

github.com/sourcegraph/sourcegraph/cmd/frontend/graphqlbackend is a code search and navigation engine.
Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Information Exposure. The site-admin area can be accessed by regular users. Unprivileged users can have access to daily usage statistics and code intelligence uploads and indexes.
It is not possible to alter the information, nor interact with any other features in the site-admin area.

github.com/luraproject/lura/v2/router/gi.remediation: Upgrade github.com/luraproject/lura/v2/router/gin to version 2.0.2 or higher.
github.com/luraproject/lura/v2/router/gi.overview:
github.com/luraproject/lura/v2/router/gin is a framework to assemble ultra performance API Gateways with middlewares; formerly known as KrakenD framework, and core service of the KrakenD API Gateway
Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Improper Input Validation due to improper sanitization of URL parameters. A malicious user can alter the backend URL defined for a pipe when remote users send crafty URL requests.

github.com/graphql-go/graphql/language/p.overview:
github.com/graphql-go/graphql/language/parser is an an implementation of GraphQL in Go.
Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Uncontrolled Recursion via the parseDocument function.

github.com/sourcegraph/sourcegraph/enter.overview: Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Access Restriction Bypass due to improper ownership validation in the code monitor. Exploiting this vulnerability makes it possible to modify triggers and actions that the attacker doesn't own.

www.velocidex.com/golang/velociraptor/ht.remediation: A fix was pushed into the master branch but not yet published.
www.velocidex.com/golang/velociraptor/ht.overview:
www.velocidex.com/golang/velociraptor/http_comms is an advanced digital forensic and incident response tool
Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Symlink Attack. Temporary local buffer files are named predictably, so an attacker could replace one with a symlink and force a race condition in which the malicious file was read instead of the legitimate one.
NOTE: 
This vulnerability is only exploitable on macOS and Linux operating systems.

www.velocidex.com/golang/velociraptor/re.remediation: A fix was pushed into the master branch but not yet published.
www.velocidex.com/golang/velociraptor/re.overview:
www.velocidex.com/golang/velociraptor/reporting is an advanced digital forensic and incident response tool
Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Cross-site Scripting (XSS) in reporting/html.go, when generating a collection report.

www.velocidex.com/golang/velociraptor/gu.overview:
www.velocidex.com/golang/velociraptor/gui/velociraptor is an advanced digital forensic and incident response tool
Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Cross-site Scripting (XSS) via the description field due to improper user input sanitization.

www.velocidex.com/golang/velociraptor/cr.remediation: A fix was pushed into the master branch but not yet published.
www.velocidex.com/golang/velociraptor/cr.overview:
www.velocidex.com/golang/velociraptor/crypto/client is a tool for collecting host based state information using The Velociraptor Query Language (VQL) queries.
Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Improper Authentication due to a bug in the handling of the communication between the client and server, it was possible for one client, already registered with their own client ID, to send messages to the server claiming to come from another client ID.

github.com/runatlantis/atlantis/server/c.overview: Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Timing Attack in the webhook event validator code, which does not use a constant-time comparison function to validate the webhook secret. It can allow an attacker to recover this secret as an attacker and then forge webhook events.

github.com/mattn/go-sqlite3.remediation: Upgrade github.com/mattn/go-sqlite3 to version 1.14.15 or higher.
github.com/mattn/go-sqlite3.overview:
Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Denial of Service (DoS) due to an assertion failure.
Exploiting this vulnerability is only possible if the SQLite instance was compiled with -DSQLITE_ENABLE_STAT4.

github.com/inoc603/go-sshd/auth.remediation: A fix was pushed into the master branch but not yet published.
github.com/inoc603/go-sshd/auth.overview: Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Incorrect Authorization due to the use of pam.Authenticate, without a call to pam.AcctMgmt. It allows a malicious actor that have expired credentials of another user to login.

github.com/libp2p/go-buffer-pool.remediation: Upgrade github.com/libp2p/go-buffer-pool to version 0.1.0 or higher.
github.com/libp2p/go-buffer-pool.overview:
github.com/libp2p/go-buffer-pool is a variable size buffer pool for golang.
Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Integer Overflow or Wraparound when the BufferPool.Get function doesn't detect negative length values and blindly converts them into uint32 positive.
Exploiting this vulnerability leads to massive RAM consumption and the process to freeze.

github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/util/oidc.remediation: Upgrade github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/util/oidc to version 1.5.8 or higher.
github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/util/oidc.overview: Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Cross-site Scripting (XSS). Login error description is not escaped before rendered.

github.com/edgexfoundry/device-sdk-go/v2.overview:
github.com/edgexfoundry/device-sdk-go/v2/internal/messaging is a set of Go packages that can be used to build Go-based device services for use within the EdgeX framework.
Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Improper Access Control via the /api/v2/config endpoint, which allows the attacker to bypass the access controls on message bus credentials and expose the credentials when running in security-enabled mode.
Exploiting this vulnerability allows attackers to intercept data or inject fake data into the EdgeX message bus.

github.com/gogs/gogs.remediation: There is no fixed version for github.com/gogs/gogs.
github.com/gogs/gogs.overview:
github.com/gogs/gogs is a painless self-hosted Git Service.
Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Arbitrary Code Execution. The git hook feature allows for authenticated remote code execution.

github.com/emicklei/go-restful/v3.remediation: Upgrade github.com/emicklei/go-restful/v3 to version 3.8.0 or higher.
github.com/emicklei/go-restful/v3.overview: Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Authorization Bypass Through User-Controlled Key which is capable of breaking CORS policy and allowing any page to make requests, and retrieve data on behalf of other users.

github.com/emicklei/go-restful/v3.remediation: Upgrade github.com/emicklei/go-restful/v3 to version 3.8.0 or higher.
github.com/emicklei/go-restful/v3.overview:
Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Authorization Bypass when using CORS Filter with a configurable AllowedDomains parameter (which is an array of domains allowed in CORS policy), with the same value as exists in allowedOriginPatterns parameter (used for matching origin using regular expression), it causes for all domains in AllowedDomains to be also used as regular expression for matching origin validation.
This behavior means that if example.com exists in AllowedDomains, all domains starting with example.com would be acceptable, including example.com.hacker.domain.

gopkg.in/macaron.v1.remediation: Upgrade gopkg.in/macaron.v1 to version 1.3.7 or higher.
gopkg.in/macaron.v1.overview:
gopkg.in/macaron.v1 is a high productive and modular web framework in Go.
Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Open Redirect. It allows remote attackers to redirect users to arbitrary web sites.

golang.org/x/net/http2/h2c.remediation: Upgrade golang.org/x/net/http2/h2c to version 0.2.0 or higher.
golang.org/x/net/http2/h2c.overview:
golang.org/x/net/http2/h2c is a module for the unencrypted "h2c" form of HTTP/2
Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to HTTP Request Smuggling when using MaxBytesHandler. An attacker can manipulate an HTTP request to cause HTTP2 frames to be read before the previous request was fully consumed.

go.mongodb.org/mongo-driver/bson/bsonrw.remediation: Upgrade go.mongodb.org/mongo-driver/bson/bsonrw to version 1.5.1 or higher.
go.mongodb.org/mongo-driver/bson/bsonrw.overview:
go.mongodb.org/mongo-driver/bson/bsonrw is a The MongoDB supported driver for Go.
Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Improper Input Validation. Specific cstrings input may not be properly validated in the MongoDB Go Driver when marshalling Go objects into BSON. A malicious user could use a Go object with specific string to potentially inject additional fields into marshalled documents.

go.pinniped.dev/internal/upstreamldap.remediation: Upgrade go.pinniped.dev/internal/upstreamldap to version 0.17.0 or higher.
go.pinniped.dev/internal/upstreamldap.overview:
go.pinniped.dev/internal/upstreamldap is an implements an abstraction of upstream LDAP IDP interactions.
Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to LDAP Injection in the Pinniped Supervisor with either LDAPIdentityProvider or ActiveDirectoryIdentityProvider resources. An attack would involve the malicious user changing the common name (CN) of their user entry on the LDAP or AD server to include special characters, which could be used to perform LDAP query injection on the Supervisor's LDAP query which determines their Kubernetes group membership.

github.com/containers/libpod/v2.vul_name: Improper Handling of Insufficient Permissions or Privileges
github.com/containers/libpod/v2.remediation: Upgrade github.com/containers/libpod/v2 to version 2.0.6 or higher.
github.com/containers/libpod/v2.overview: Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Improper Handling of Insufficient Permissions or Privileges that allows files to be overwritten the first time a container is mounted, even if the files are read-only.

github.com/containers/libpod.vul_name: Improper Handling of Insufficient Permissions or Privileges
github.com/containers/libpod.remediation: Upgrade github.com/containers/libpod to version 1.8.1-rc1 or higher.
github.com/containers/libpod.overview: Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Improper Handling of Insufficient Permissions or Privileges that allows files to be overwritten the first time a container is mounted, even if the files are read-only.

git.arvados.org/arvados.git/lib/controll.overview:
Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Improper Authentication when using Portable Authentication Modules (PAM) for user authentication. If a user presents valid credentials but the account is disabled or otherwise not allowed to access the host (such as an expired password), it would still be accepted for access to Arvados. 
** Note: **
Other authentication methods (LDAP, OpenID Connect) supported by Arvados are not affected by this flaw.

github.com/stackrox/rox.remediation: There is no fixed version for github.com/stackrox/rox.
github.com/stackrox/rox.overview:
github.com/stackrox/rox is a The StackRox Kubernetes Security Platform performs a risk analysis of the container environment, delivers visibility and runtime alerts, and provides recommendations to proactively improve security by hardening the environment.
Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Information Exposure via GraphQL API calls, which expose Notifier secrets.

github.com/containers/libpod.remediation: Upgrade github.com/containers/libpod to version 1.7.0 or higher.
github.com/containers/libpod.overview: Affected versions of this package are vulnerable to Improper Authorization. File permissions for non-root users running in a privileged container are not correctly checked. This flaw can be abused by a low-privileged user inside the container to access any other file within it, even if owned by the root user inside the same container. It does not allow to directly escape the container, though being a privileged container means that a lot of security features are disabled when running it. The highest threat from this vulnerability is to data confidentiality and integrity as well as system availability.
